name: I.M.P
description: there is no more to come for this bot. i’ve moved on in my life and got a life. to those GOONERS that i KNOW are reading this… just stop. speak to a real person. go out and socialize. swallow that social anxiety, make friends… your life would be a lot better and you wouldn’t be here, gooning to this AI thing. the only reason im not deleting is so that you can read this message. just socialize, do something — just dont goon, its ruining your brain and this WILL have long-term effects on you. good luck, i hope you get guided, and i wish the best for you.
creator: riseofgru
